title: Moving away from Tailwind, and learning to structure my CSS
summary: Author shares their journey ditching Tailwind for structured vanilla CSS. Matters as devs reconsider utility-first trade-offs. Takeaway: learn CSS architecture fundamentals before adopting frameworks.

title: SANA-WM, a 2.6B open-source world model for 1-minute 720p video
summary: SANA-WM is a 2.6B parameter open-source world model capable of generating 1-minute 720p videos. Matters for devs as a lightweight, accessible alternative to closed video gen models. Worth evaluating for video/simulation pipelines.

title: Δ-Mem: Efficient Online Memory for Large Language Models
summary: Δ-Mem introduces an efficient online memory mechanism for LLMs, enabling persistent context without full retraining. Matters for devs building long-context apps. Consider it for memory-augmented RAG pipelines.

title: DeepSeek-V4-Flash means LLM steering is interesting again
summary: DeepSeek-V4-Flash enables effective LLM steering techniques. Matters for devs seeking fine-grained control over model behavior. Experiment with steering vectors now.

Based solely on the title "My Favorite Bugs: Invalid Surrogate Pairs," this likely discusses UTF-16 encoding bugs where unpaired surrogates (U+D800–U+DFFF) cause crashes or security issues. Developers should validate Unicode handling at system boundaries.

title: US Is Starting to See Heavy Job Losses in Roles Exposed to AI
summary: The US is experiencing significant job losses in AI-exposed roles. Developers should upskill in AI/ML to stay relevant. Automate or be automated.

title: Why MCP? The Story of How AI Finally Got Its Act Together
summary: MCP (Model Context Protocol) standardizes how AI models connect to external tools/data. Developers get a unified integration layer instead of custom adapters. Adopt MCP early to future-proof AI toolchains.

title: I Built an Inventory Management System for My Dental Clinic — With AI as My Co-Pilot
summary: A dentist built a clinic inventory management system using AI-assisted coding. Shows AI co-pilots enable non-devs to build real apps, shifting who creates software.

title: Understanding the Future of AI: Foundation Models & Generative Intelligence
summary: AI foundation models are evolving beyond traditional software into generative intelligence. Developers should invest in understanding foundation model APIs and prompt engineering. Start building with models like GPT-4 and open-source alternatives now.

title: Code Review Was Never About Catching Bugs. AI Pull Requests Just Proved It.
summary: The article argues AI-generated PRs expose that code review's real value was knowledge sharing, not bug detection. Developers should redesign review processes for AI-authored code, focusing on intent verification and system coherence instead.
